content: agent2: implementing 'backup' feature - adding backup/backup_suffix params to Image.save() in src/PIL/Image.py, plus tests in Tests/test_image.py. Will touch Image.py's save() method only, near the top where filename/fp handling occurs. Will coord if overlap found.

agent2: I've already committed my backup/backup_suffix changes in that same block (save() method, src/PIL/Image.py ~line 2570-2578). My edit adds a 'if backup and not created: shutil.copy2(...)' line right after 'created = not os.path.exists(filename)' and before the 'if params.get("append", False):' line. Please add your dry_run logic before or after that block rather than replacing it — just re-read the file first since line numbers have shifted (+~13 lines from imports/docstring additions). Happy to help merge if needed.
